mysite
Table of Contents

Class BaseRepository

Namespace
Service.Impl
Assembly
Service.dll

Abstract base class for all SQL Server repositories, providing low-level ADO.NET helpers.

public abstract class BaseRepository
Inheritance
object
BaseRepository
Derived
BaseBusinessSqlRepository
FamiliaRepository
LogRepository
PatenteRepository
UsuarioRepository
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Each helper opens its own SqlConnection unless a shared conn is injected (used by DAL.Impl.BaseBusinessSqlRepository when enrolled in a DAL.Impl.SqlServer.UnitOfWork transaction).

Constructors

BaseRepository(string)

Initializes the repository with the connection string identified by connectionStringName.

public BaseRepository(string connectionStringName = "IngSoftwareBase")

Parameters

connectionStringName string

Key used to look up the connection string via GetConnectionString(string). Defaults to BaseConnectionName.

Fields

_connectionString

Raw ADO.NET connection string resolved from ConnectionManager.

protected readonly string _connectionString

Field Value

string

Methods

ExecuteNonQuery(string, SqlParameter[], SqlConnection, SqlTransaction)

Executes a non-query SQL statement (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE).

protected void ExecuteNonQuery(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters, SqlConnection conn = null, SqlTransaction tran = null)

Parameters

query string

Parameterized SQL statement.

parameters SqlParameter[]

SQL parameters to bind, or null for none.

conn SqlConnection

Optional shared connection. When provided, the command runs on this connection using tran (if any), without opening a new connection.

tran SqlTransaction

Optional transaction to enlist the command in.

ExecuteReader<T>(string, SqlParameter[], Func<SqlDataReader, T>)

Executes a SELECT query and projects the result via a mapping delegate. Always opens a new connection; use BaseBusinessSqlRepository overload for UoW reads.

protected T ExecuteReader<T>(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters, Func<SqlDataReader, T> map)

Parameters

query string

Parameterized SQL SELECT statement.

parameters SqlParameter[]

SQL parameters to bind, or null for none.

map Func<SqlDataReader, T>

Delegate that receives the open SqlDataReader and returns T.

Returns

T

The value produced by map.

Type Parameters

T

The projection type returned by map.

ExecuteScalar<T>(string, SqlParameter[])

Executes a scalar query and returns the first column of the first row.

protected T ExecuteScalar<T>(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters)

Parameters

query string

Parameterized SQL statement.

parameters SqlParameter[]

SQL parameters to bind, or null for none.

Returns

T

The scalar value cast to T, or default(T) if the result is NULL.

Type Parameters

T

The expected return type. DBNull is converted to default(T).
